records.m_Talk_ENG: It's too quiet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's too quiet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's too quiet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Judging by how many we fought at the harbor, there's no way it should be this quiet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Judging by how many we fought at the harbor, there's no way it should be this quiet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Judging by how many we fought at the harbor, there's no way it should be this quiet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Feels like a ghost could pop out any second.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Feels like a ghost could pop out any second.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Feels like a ghost could pop out any second.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then allow me to lead the way, girl.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then allow me to lead the way, girl.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then allow me to lead the way, girl.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To protect the weak and strike down evil is the path of the Judicator of Evil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To protect the weak and strike down evil is the path of the Judicator of Evil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To protect the weak and strike down evil is the path of the Judicator of Evil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike you, who tremble at ghosts, such trifles don't concern me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike you, who tremble at ghosts, such trifles don't concern me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike you, who tremble at ghosts, such trifles don't concern me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what?! You are doing this even now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what?! You are doing this even now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?! You are doing this even now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha! An aspiring hero of justice isn't scared of some ghost!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha! An aspiring hero of justice isn't scared of some ghost!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha! An aspiring hero of justice isn't scared of some ghost!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, no, you don't! Gabriel! It's on!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, no, you don't! Gabriel! It's on!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, no, you don't! Gabriel! It's on!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Both of you, cut the act and keep it down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Both of you, cut the act and keep it down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Both of you, cut the act and keep it down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Fatima is right, the CSE level should still be rising.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Fatima is right, the CSE level should still be rising.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Fatima is right, the CSE level should still be rising.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's creeping up from 3 for now, but there's no harm in being careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's creeping up from 3 for now, but there's no harm in being careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's creeping up from 3 for now, but there's no harm in being careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With that much Eternium stored here, anything could happen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With that much Eternium stored here, anything could happen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With that much Eternium stored here, anything could happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At our level, we can handle Category 3 C.O.s, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: At our level, we can handle Category 3 C.O.s, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: At our level, we can handle Category 3 C.O.s, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leader gave us Alternium Reactors. We powered up a lot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leader gave us Alternium Reactors. We powered up a lot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leader gave us Alternium Reactors. We powered up a lot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would take time, but doable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would take time, but doable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would take time, but doable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Leader were here, it would be faster, but that's not the point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Leader were here, it would be faster, but that's not the point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Leader were here, it would be faster, but that's not the point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Move with caution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Move with caution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Move with caution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are nearing the depot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are nearing the depot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are nearing the depot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As I thought...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As I thought...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As I thought...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's where the depot is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's where the depot is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's where the depot is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Looks like every C.O. nearby has gathered there...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Looks like every C.O. nearby has gathered there...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Looks like every C.O. nearby has gathered there...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That cocoon...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That cocoon...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That cocoon...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did it ascend using Eternium as a catalyst?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did it ascend using Eternium as a catalyst?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did it ascend using Eternium as a catalyst?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gabriel... I didn't expect such logical deduction from you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gabriel... I didn't expect such logical deduction from you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gabriel... I didn't expect such logical deduction from you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Girl, that sounded rather rude.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Girl, that sounded rather rude.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Girl, that sounded rather rude.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gabriel is right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gabriel is right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gabriel is right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Odds are high it's a cocoon for a Category 4 C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Odds are high it's a cocoon for a Category 4 C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Odds are high it's a cocoon for a Category 4 C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're pulling back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're pulling back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're pulling back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. The Eternium depot is right there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. The Eternium depot is right there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. The Eternium depot is right there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our objective is to secure Eternium and return, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our objective is to secure Eternium and return, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our objective is to secure Eternium and return, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then who's handling that cocoon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then who's handling that cocoon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then who's handling that cocoon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might handle Category 3 somehow, but a Category 4 is nonsense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might handle Category 3 somehow, but a Category 4 is nonsense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might handle Category 3 somehow, but a Category 4 is nonsense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless someone here can take down a Category 4 C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless someone here can take down a Category 4 C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless someone here can take down a Category 4 C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are a TASKFORCE hired for a mission and paid accordingly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are a TASKFORCE hired for a mission and paid accordingly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are a TASKFORCE hired for a mission and paid accordingly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I am responsible for your lives in Leader's place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I am responsible for your lives in Leader's place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I am responsible for your lives in Leader's place.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I judge we can't complete the mission with our strength, so we're
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I judge we can't complete the mission with our strength, so we're
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I judge we can't complete the mission with our strength, so we're
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, they noticed us already.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, they noticed us already.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, they noticed us already.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
With my Stationary Swordsmanship, those wretches will be felled in one
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
With my Stationary Swordsmanship, those wretches will be felled in one
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
With my Stationary Swordsmanship, those wretches will be felled in one
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! W-what are you doing, girl!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! W-what are you doing, girl!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! W-what are you doing, girl!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you crazy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you crazy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you crazy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a whole mob guarding that cocoon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a whole mob guarding that cocoon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a whole mob guarding that cocoon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe we could handle one, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe we could handle one, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe we could handle one, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Any more and we die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Any more and we die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Any more and we die!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course I know that much, girl.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course I know that much, girl.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course I know that much, girl.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how could one who devoted himself to the eradication of evil flee before a horde of them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how could one who devoted himself to the eradication of evil flee before a horde of them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how could one who devoted himself to the eradication of evil flee before a horde of them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An aspiring hero of justice can't be scared by C.O.s and their numbers!
records.m_Talk_DEU: An aspiring hero of justice can't be scared by C.O.s and their numbers!
records.m_Talk_FRA: An aspiring hero of justice can't be scared by C.O.s and their numbers!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gabriel! Let's fight together!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gabriel! Let's fight together!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gabriel! Let's fight together!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think you are doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think you are doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think you are doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get down, now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get down, now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get down, now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chowon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chowon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chowon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. For now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. For now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. For now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll stall them with what I have. Fall back and call for support!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll stall them with what I have. Fall back and call for support!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll stall them with what I have. Fall back and call for support!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I can't run and leave you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I can't run and leave you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I can't run and leave you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could I become a hero of justice if I abandon my comrades?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could I become a hero of justice if I abandon my comrades?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could I become a hero of justice if I abandon my comrades?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree, girl!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree, girl!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree, girl!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A man sometimes throws himself in for friendship!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A man sometimes throws himself in for friendship!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A man sometimes throws himself in for friendship!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... idiots... Fine, have it your way...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... idiots... Fine, have it your way...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... idiots... Fine, have it your way...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you ready, girl?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you ready, girl?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you ready, girl?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whenever you are, Gabriel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whenever you are, Gabriel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whenever you are, Gabriel!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Don't come blaming me If you lose an arm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Don't come blaming me If you lose an arm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Don't come blaming me If you lose an arm.

root.m_Talk_FRA: A man sometimes throws himself in for friendship!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You... idiots... Fine, have it your way...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You... idiots... Fine, have it your way...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You... idiots... Fine, have it your way...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you ready, girl?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you ready, girl?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you ready, girl?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whenever you are, Gabriel!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whenever you are, Gabriel!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whenever you are, Gabriel!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Don't come blaming me If you lose an arm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Don't come blaming me If you lose an arm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Don't come blaming me If you lose an arm.
